payload.notes: E08 Symphony Web UI Controller Ready-only retirement slice.
payload.title: Ready work story delete action

payload.evidence: Implemented Ready-only retire action: backend POST /api/tasks/<story-id>/retire re-checks derived Ready state, updates story.status to retired, board omits retired stories, React detail confirms deletion and refreshes board. Validation passed: cargo fmt --check; cargo test -p harness-symphony retire -- --nocapture; cargo test -p harness-symphony board_omits_retired_stories_from_active_work -- --nocapture; cargo test -p harness-symphony web -- --nocapture; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e; cargo test --workspace; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run desktop:smoke; git diff --check.

payload.actions_taken: ["read Harness docs and US-064 packet","implemented retired-story board filtering","added Ready-only retire API endpoint","added React confirmation delete action","added Rust and Playwright coverage","installed Web UI dependencies with npm ci","ran validation and updated durable proof"]
payload.decisions_made: ["Retire is a story.status lifecycle transition instead of physical deletion","backend validates derived Ready state immediately before retirement","retired stories are omitted from active board items instead of displayed as Done","validation commands ran with HARNESS env unset to avoid test fixture changeset pollution"]
payload.errors: ["npm build initially failed because package-local dependencies were absent before npm ci","initial focused cargo test command used two filters and was rerun as valid focused commands"]
payload.harness_friction: Fresh Symphony worktree did not have Web UI dependencies installed; npm ci was required before package validation.
payload.notes: Validation passed: cargo fmt --check; cargo test -p harness-symphony retire -- --nocapture; cargo test -p harness-symphony board_omits_retired_stories_from_active_work -- --nocapture; cargo test -p harness-symphony web -- --nocapture; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e; cargo test --workspace; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run desktop:smoke; git diff --check.
